title: Mastercard Teams With Crypto Giants on Blockchain Payment Program
message_html: Mastercard Teams With Crypto Giants on Blockchain Payment Program ...
snippet: Mastercard has launched an initiative aimed at exploring the future of cryptocurrency payments. The company’s Crypto Partner Program, announced Wednesday (March 11), brings together 85 different digital asset and payments companies, including high-profile players like Binance, Circle, Gemini, PayPal

title: Stablecoins won't get any kind of deposit insurance under GENIUS rules, says FDIC chief

title: Ghana's SEC Grants 11 Companies Access to Cryptocurrency Regulatory Sandbox
message_html: Ghana's SEC Grants 11 Companies Access to Cryptocurrency Regulatory Sandbox ...
snippet: CoinDesk (@CoinDesk): LATEST: Ghana’s Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) said 11 companies have been granted access to a regulatory sandbox to test cryptocurrency and digital asset services under the country’s Virtual Asset Service Providers Act.
